hooks.command: try { $sr = [System.IO.StreamReader]::new([Console]::OpenStandardInput(), [Text.Encoding]::UTF8); $data = $sr.ReadToEnd() | ConvertFrom-Json; $sr.Close(); $cwd = if ($data.cwd) { $data.cwd } else { $PWD.Path }; $project = Split-Path $cwd -Leaf; if ($project -match '^worktrees$|^\.' ) { $project = Split-Path (Split-Path $cwd) -Leaf }; $raw = if ($data.last_assistant_message) { $data.last_assistant_message } else { 'Task completed.' }; $msg = ($raw -replace '[*`#>|]{2,}','' -replace '\s+',' ').Trim(); if ($msg.Length -gt 100) { $msg = $msg.Substring(0,100) + '...' }; & "$env:USERPROFILE\.claude\show-toast.ps1" -Title "Claude Code - $project" -Message $msg -Icon "$env:USERPROFILE\.claude\claude-icon.png" } catch { & "$env:USERPROFILE\.claude\show-toast.ps1" -Title 'Claude Code' -Message 'Task completed.' -Icon "$env:USERPROFILE\.claude\claude-icon.png" }

try { $sr = [System.IO.StreamReader]::new([Console]::OpenStandardInput(), [Text.Encoding]::UTF8); $data = $sr.ReadToEnd() | ConvertFrom-Json; $sr.Close(); $msg = if ($data.message) { $data.message } else { 'Awaiting permission...' }; if ($msg.Length -gt 120) { $msg = $msg.Substring(0,120) + '...' }; $cwd = if ($data.cwd) { $data.cwd } else { $PWD.Path }; $project = Split-Path $cwd -Leaf; if ($project -match '^worktrees$|^\.' ) { $project = Split-Path (Split-Path $cwd) -Leaf }; & "$env:USERPROFILE\.claude\show-toast.ps1" -Title "Claude Code - $project" -Message $msg -Icon "$env:USERPROFILE\.claude\claude-icon.png" } catch { & "$env:USERPROFILE\.claude\show-toast.ps1" -Title 'Claude Code' -Message 'Awaiting permission...' -Icon "$env:USERPROFILE\.claude\claude-icon.png" }

try { $sr = [System.IO.StreamReader]::new([Console]::OpenStandardInput(), [Text.Encoding]::UTF8); $data = $sr.ReadToEnd() | ConvertFrom-Json; $sr.Close(); $cwd = if ($data.cwd) { $data.cwd } else { $PWD.Path }; $project = Split-Path $cwd -Leaf; if ($project -match '^worktrees$|^\.' ) { $project = Split-Path (Split-Path $cwd) -Leaf }; $raw = if ($data.last_assistant_message) { $data.last_assistant_message } else { 'Agent task completed.' }; $msg = ($raw -replace '[*`#>|]{2,}','' -replace '\s+',' ').Trim(); if ($msg.Length -gt 100) { $msg = $msg.Substring(0,100) + '...' }; & "$env:USERPROFILE\.claude\show-toast.ps1" -Title "Claude Code Agent - $project" -Message $msg -Icon "$env:USERPROFILE\.claude\claude-icon.png" } catch { & "$env:USERPROFILE\.claude\show-toast.ps1" -Title 'Claude Code Agent' -Message 'Agent task completed.' -Icon "$env:USERPROFILE\.claude\claude-icon.png" }
